events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes rebar placement on a heavy-industrial site. The observed field condition is "missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt)." This is a serious defect because rebar mats must be supported on chairs/spacers to maintain proper concrete cover and position. If the mat is sitting on dirt, the rebar will not have proper bottom cover, and it may be displaced during concrete placement.

This is non-compliant with ACI 318 (which requires proper concrete cover and placement tolerances per ACI 117). The work is rough-complete but defective. The task says treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.

Decision: fail (non-compliant and defective work)
Risk: high (rebar on dirt means no concrete cover, structural integrity compromised)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: 70
Confidence: 0.9
Findings: missing chairs/supports, mat resting on dirt, insufficient concrete cover
Actions: lift mat, install chairs/spacers per placing drawings, verify cover and tolerances before pour
References: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings
